Class JavaMethodToolResponse

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event.BasicPropertyChangeSource
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.AbstractToolResponse<JavaMethodToolCall>
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java.JavaMethodToolResponse
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
public class JavaMethodToolResponse extends AbstractToolResponse<JavaMethodToolCall>
A rich POJO that captures the complete and final outcome of a single tool call. This class now follows a deferred execution model and manages the thread-local context for Java tool execution.
Author:
anahata-gemini-pro-2.5

    A thread-local storage for the currently executing Java tool response.

    The raw exception thrown during execution, for debugging and session serialization.
    private AtomicBoolean
    executing
    Guard to ensure only one thread can execute this response at a time.

    getPropertyChangeSupport

  • Field Details

    • current

      private static final ThreadLocal<JavaMethodToolResponse> current
      A thread-local storage for the currently executing Java tool response. This allows tool logic to access its own context without explicit parameter passing.

    • exception

      private transient Throwable exception
      The raw exception thrown during execution, for debugging and session serialization. Ignored during schema generation as it's an internal detail.

    • executing

      private transient AtomicBoolean executing
      Guard to ensure only one thread can execute this response at a time.

  • Constructor Details

    • JavaMethodToolResponse

      public JavaMethodToolResponse(@NonNull @NonNull JavaMethodToolCall call)
      Constructs a new JavaMethodToolResponse for a specific call.
      Parameters:
      call - The originating tool call.

  • Method Details

    • getCurrent

      public static JavaMethodToolResponse getCurrent()
      Gets the tool response associated with the current thread.
      Returns:
      The active tool response, or null if none is active.

    • setCurrent

      public static void setCurrent(JavaMethodToolResponse response)
      Sets the tool response for the current thread.
      Parameters:
      response - The response to set, or null to clear the context.

    • rebind

      public void rebind()
      Re-initializes the transient PropertyChangeSupport after deserialization.
      Specified by:
      rebind in interface Rebindable
      Overrides:
      rebind in class AbstractToolResponse<JavaMethodToolCall>

    • execute

      public void execute()
      Description copied from class: AbstractToolResponse
      Executes the tool logic. This method is responsible for populating the status, result, errors, and executionTimeMillis fields.
      Specified by:
      execute in class AbstractToolResponse<JavaMethodToolCall>

    • stop

      public void stop()
      Description copied from class: AbstractToolResponse
      Stops the tool execution if it is currently running.
      Specified by:
      stop in class AbstractToolResponse<JavaMethodToolCall>
